Local SEO Services

Show up in mapswhen locals actually search.

Local visibility for businesses that live and die by proximity. Map pack rankings, Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, and location pages. All working together so nearby searches become calls.

Get Your Local SEO AuditView Our Work

You can be five minutes away and still invisible on Google Maps

Most service businesses get found through the map pack. If your profile is half-finished or your business name shows up five different ways online, those jobs go to whoever looks more established.

  • Google Business Profile sits on default settings with the wrong categories and outdated photos.
  • Your name, address, and phone number do not match across directories, which confuses Google.
  • Competitors add reviews every week while yours stall at a handful from 2022.
  • City landing pages are thin or missing, so neighborhood searches skip you for national brands.

Local search treated market by market

  • GBP tuned for categories, services, posts, photos, and Q&A that match how people search in your area.
  • Citation cleanup plus new listings on the directories that actually matter in your trade.
  • Review systems that keep new feedback coming in without breaking platform rules.
  • Location pages with real local detail, schema, and internal links that rank for city and neighborhood terms.

Proof it works

Trust signals from real client work, not vanity metrics.

Case Study

Dental Practice

Map pack visibility swung week to week. A competitor with fewer reviews and worse photos kept outranking them in two of three locations.

New patient bookings up 340% in six months after GBP overhaul, citation cleanup, and review velocity work.

Read the full case study

Why Most Local SEO Fails to Fill Your Calendar

What most agencies get wrong — and how we approach it differently.

01

Issue 01

Incomplete GBP profiles

Wrong categories, missing services, bad photos. Competitors with half your experience show up above you in the map pack.

02

Issue 02

Citation chaos

Your address shows up three different ways across directories. Google stops trusting your location data.

03

Issue 03

City-name page spam

Template pages for every suburb you serve. Google flags them as low quality and they never rank.

04

Issue 04

No call tracking

You see map views go up but cannot tie a single ranking to a booked job. Optimization becomes guesswork.

How we grow your local visibility

A clear process from audit to rankings in the map pack and local search.

  1. Phase 1

    Local Audit and Competitor Review

    We map your Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, and local rankings against the businesses actually winning calls in your market.

    Full local audit delivered in week 1

  2. Phase 2

    Google Business Profile Optimization

    Categories, services, photos, posts, and Q&A tuned for the searches that book jobs in your area.

    Average 3.2x increase in GBP impressions in 90 days

  3. Phase 3

    Citation and NAP Cleanup

    We fix inconsistent name, address, and phone data across directories so Google trusts your location signals.

    45+ directories audited per client

  4. Phase 4

    Location Content and On-Page SEO

    Service area pages and local landing pages with real market context, not city-name swaps.

    Pages built to pass Google's local quality checks

  5. Phase 5

    Review Strategy and Reporting

    A steady review generation process plus monthly reporting on map pack rankings, calls, and direction requests.

    Weekly rank tracking for priority local keywords

What you get with our local SEO program

Map pack visibility, calls, and booked jobs.

Scope of work

  • Google Business Profile Management

    Profile optimization, weekly posts, photo updates, service listings, and performance tracking.

  • Citation Audit and Building

    NAP consistency fixes and new listings on industry-relevant directories and data aggregators.

  • Review Strategy and Monitoring

    Review request workflows, response templates, and reputation tracking by location.

  • Location Page Development

    Unique city and neighborhood pages with local content, schema, and internal linking.

  • Local Link Building

    Sponsorships, local partnerships, and community placements that build geographic authority.

  • Local Rank and Lead Reporting

    Map pack tracking, call tracking, direction requests, and lead volume by location.

Transparent Pricing

See what's included at each tier.

Common Questions

FAQ

How is local SEO different from regular SEO?+

Regular SEO chases rankings on standard search results. Local SEO is built for the map pack: Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, and location pages. If your customers search by city or "near me," you need both, but local is what puts you on the map.

How much does local SEO cost?+

Single-location businesses usually run $2,000 to $5,000 per month. Multi-location brands scale from $3,500 to $10,000+ based on how many markets you cover and how tight the competition is. We quote after looking at your locations and current visibility.

How many Google reviews do I need?+

There is no magic number. In competitive markets, staying in the top three map spots often means 50 to 100+ reviews. We focus on steady monthly volume and thoughtful responses, not a one-time push that fades.

Can you manage multiple Google Business Profiles?+

Yes. We run multi-location accounts with separate content, review workflows, and reporting per market. Franchises and multi-branch operators are a big part of what we do.

Let's Talk

Ready to Build a Revenue System?

No deck. No rehearsed presentation. Bring your actual situation: what's not working, what you've already tried, what you're hoping to fix. We'll have an honest conversation about whether we can help.
